"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\ShadowBreach.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\ShadowBreach.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\ShadowBreach.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\ShadowBreach.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o ShadowBreach.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libShadowBreach.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\ShadowBreach.dir\linkLibs.rsp
